paper_title: XLNet: Generalized Autoregressive Pretraining for Language Understanding

extraction_data.innovation: Scales the permutation language modeling approach to a larger model with the same architecture hyper‑parameters as BERT‑Large, achieving higher performance on language understanding benchmarks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus, English Wikipedia, Giga5, ClueWeb2012-B, Common Crawl
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine‑tuning on downstream NLU benchmarks (e.g., GLUE, SQuAD, RACE)
extraction_data.extension: Integrates Transformer‑XL relative positional encodings and segment‑recurrence mechanism into the permutation language modeling framework
extraction_data.application: Question answering, natural language inference, sentiment analysis, document ranking, and other downstream NLP tasks.
extraction_data.paper_title: XLNet: Generalized Autoregressive Pretraining for Language Understanding
